RunSetup.title: Candidate Setup
RunSetup.subtitle: Choose your run parameters. Good luck with the interview.

poolMode.title: Question Pool Format
poolMode.description: Choose a preset direction or build the pool manually.

technologies.title: Technologies in Pool
technologies.description: Selected technologies can appear during the run.

briefing.title: Run Briefing
briefing.description: Build your pool and enter the interview.

items.setup: Choose Frontend preset or build Custom.
items.rooms: Choose doors, clear rooms, answer questions.
items.goal: Reach the final interview and survive.

startBonus.title: Start Gift
startBonus.description: You receive a random <gift>gift</gift> at the start of the run.

next.title: What Next?
next.description: After starting, you enter the first room, receive a <gift>gift</gift>, and choose a path.

pool.label: pool
pool.description: Question pool is the set of topics used for challenges.

stack.label: stack
stack.description: Stack is a preset set of technologies for the run.

gift.label: gift
gift.description: Gift is a positive effect that strengthens the candidate.

distortion.label: distortion
distortion.description: Distortion is a negative effect that makes the run harder.

run.label: run
run.description: A run is one attempt to clear rooms and reach the final interview.

buffDescriptions.doorInsight: Reveals information about one of the next paths.
buffDescriptions.easierNextRoom: Reduces the difficulty of the next room.
buffDescriptions.skipQuestion: Allows you to skip one question without a penalty.
